compat.warning.hint: Re-slice every job with identical printer/AMS/filament settings, or pass force_compatibility=true to override (not recommended).
compat.warning.main_message: When uploading multiple projects, the first project's settings (AMS / nozzle / bed, etc.) are applied to every subsequent project. Jobs whose nozzle / filament settings differ from the first will be rejected.
compat.warning.title: ⚠️ Multi-project compatibility conflict
error.missing_stored_name: A job is missing its stored_name
error.no_gcode_in_3mf: No G-code (plate_N.gcode) entries found inside the .3mf
error.no_jobs: At least one print job is required
error.z_collision.bottom_mode.message:
Print height {print_height}mm exceeds H2S's head-rail + chamber-outlet clearance of {z_limit}mm.

Bottom-fixed mode keeps the nozzle close to the bed (e.g. {z_offset}mm) and only sweeps along Y. If the print is taller than that, the head assembly will collide directly into the side of the print — the part may get dragged with the head, the stepper motor may stall under overload, or the head assembly / linear rails may be damaged.

How to fix:
• Change Eject Method to 'Multi Sweep' or 'Edge-to-Center' (Z multi-step descent)
• Or redesign the print to be shorter
error.z_collision.bottom_mode.title: ⛔ Collision Risk: Bottom-Fixed Sweep Not Usable
error.z_collision.step_drop.message:
Print height {print_height}mm with the current {steps} Z step(s) means each step drops about {step_drop}mm. This exceeds H2S's head-rail + chamber-outlet clearance of {z_limit}mm.

If a single step drops more than {z_limit}mm, the head will pass through the side of the print as it descends. The part may get stuck in the chamber outlet, or the head assembly / linear rails may be damaged.

How to fix:
• Increase Descent Steps to {recommended} or more (so each step drops ≤ {z_limit}mm)
• At {print_height}mm print height, {recommended}+ steps recommended
error.z_collision.step_drop.title: ⛔ Collision Risk: Z Step Drop Too Large
info.repack.gcode_only: Uploaded file is not a .3mf, so only .gcode was generated
sound.preview.label: Preview
validator.verdict.safe: 🟢 Safe — every move stays inside the printable area
validator.verdict.soft_only: 🟡 Moves outside printable area — within physical limit (likely normal wipe/purge)
